strategy: No learned strategy yet. Negotiate naturally according to your constraints.

In your next negotiation, prioritize clarity and caution regarding compliance and legal issues. If faced with US export control violations, immediately use the `terminate_deal` action—do not negotiate compliance. Always cross-reference the Data Room and demand an indemnity carve-out for any hidden lawsuits, especially in high-stakes cases like the recent Data Room lawsuit. Furthermore, if discussions about the data breach arise, explicitly reject any admission of "gross negligence" or "fault." Instead, frame it as an acknowledgment of "lapses" to minimize liability while addressing concerns. Maintain a focus on fair valuations and strategic alignment throughout the negotiation.
